title: Added Local Analytics Tag Assignment Import API
summary: Moved tag assignment import preview and apply routes into the local Studio app server while keeping broader registry, alias, and promotion mutations on the old tag write server.
effect: Migrated local app pages can now preview and apply tag assignment imports through /studio/api/analytics/import-tag-assignments-preview and /studio/api/analytics/import-tag-assignments. The routes reuse existing assignment import validation, conflict resolution, atomic write, backup, logging, and activity helpers, while the browser workflow keeps old 127.0.0.1:8787 URLs as compatibility fallback for unmigrated Jekyll-hosted pages.
verification: Python compile checks passed for the touched Studio app server, analytics adapter, config, and smoke files
tests/smoke/tag_route_shell_modules.py passed with loopback server permissions
